system.description:
When you Investigate!, roll +Brains.

Spend Hold 1-for-1 to ask:

  • What happened here, in the real sequence of events?
  • What force or influence is at work (human, occult, institutional, etc)?
  • What person, organization, or faction is implicated?
  • What can it do (capabilities, reach, constraints)?
  • What is the vulnerability (what disrupts, binds, exposes, or hurts it)?
  • Where does this lead next?
  • What is being concealed, and who benefits from the concealment?
  • What hidden history or suppressed scholarship underlies this?

failure.value: Hold 1, but you learn something terrible that you wish wasn't true.

critical.value: Hold 2, and you may ask the Director any question you want about the mystery, not just the listed ones.
